_comment: Full Trading Layer OpenAPI spec, fetched verbatim from the live source. Re-fetch and diff if backend behavior diverges from any field documented here.

info.title: TradingLayer MT5 REST API
info.description:
Canonical MT5 REST API for tenant owner and trader accounts.

Broker trade outcomes are returned as response data. HTTP errors are reserved for API and platform failures.

Mt5ConnectionStatus.description: Stored MT5 credential state for this account.

trade_mode.description: MT5 ENUM_SYMBOL_TRADE_MODE: 0 disabled, 1 long-only, 2 short-only, 3 close-only, 4 full trading.
x-enumDescriptions: Trading is disabled for this symbol.
Only closing existing positions is allowed.

trade_allowed.description: Whether account-level MT5 trading is allowed.

Mt5AccountInfo.description: Live MT5 account info for connected traders when the API key also has `mt5:read`. Present on `GET /api/v1/traders/{traderId}`; omitted from list responses.

path.description: Symbol tree path in the MT5 terminal.

visible.description: Whether the symbol is visible in Market Watch.

trade_mode.description: MT5 ENUM_SYMBOL_TRADE_MODE: 0 disabled, 1 long-only, 2 short-only, 3 close-only, 4 full trading.
x-enumDescriptions: Trading is disabled for this symbol.
Only closing existing positions is allowed.

path.description: Symbol tree path in the MT5 terminal.

visible.description: Whether the symbol is visible in Market Watch.

digits.description: Number of digits after the decimal point for prices on this symbol.

point.description: Smallest quoted price point for the symbol.

trade_mode.description: MT5 ENUM_SYMBOL_TRADE_MODE: 0 disabled, 1 long-only, 2 short-only, 3 close-only, 4 full trading.
x-enumDescriptions: Trading is disabled for this symbol.
Only closing existing positions is allowed.

trade_exemode.description: MT5 ENUM_SYMBOL_TRADE_EXECUTION: 0 request, 1 instant, 2 market, 3 exchange.

trade_calc_mode.description: MT5 ENUM_SYMBOL_CALC_MODE describing how margin and profit are computed.

trade_contract_size.description: Contract size used by MT5 for margin and profit calculations.

trade_tick_value.description: Value of one tick (smallest price change) in the deposit currency.

trade_tick_size.description: Minimum price change for this symbol.

trade_tick_value_profit.description: Tick value when the price moves in the position's favor (deposit currency).

trade_tick_value_loss.description: Tick value when the price moves against the position (deposit currency). Use this for client-side risk sizing.

filling_mode.description: Bit mask of MT5 volume filling policies allowed for this symbol.

order_mode.description: Bit mask of MT5 order types allowed for this symbol.

volume_real.description: Exchange real volume when the broker provides it.

flags.description: MT5 tick flag bit mask describing which tick fields changed.

time.description: Bar open time as Unix seconds.

spread.description: Spread in points for this bar.

real_volume.description: Exchange real volume when the broker provides it.

Mt5TradeRetcode.description: Known MT5 trade server return code. `null` means the runtime did not return a trade-server retcode.
x-enumDescriptions: Only part of the request was completed (partial)
There is not enough money to complete the request (rejected)
There are no quotes to process the request (rejected)
Invalid order expiration date in the request (rejected)
No connection with the trade server (rejected)
Operation is allowed only for live accounts (rejected)
The number of pending orders has reached the limit (rejected)
The volume of orders and positions for the symbol has reached the limit (rejected)
Position with the specified identifier has already been closed (rejected)
A close volume exceeds the current position volume (rejected)
A close order already exists for the specified position (rejected)
The number of open positions has reached the limit (rejected)
The pending order activation request was rejected and the order canceled (rejected)
Only long positions are allowed for the symbol (rejected)
Only short positions are allowed for the symbol (rejected)
Only position closing is allowed for the symbol (rejected)
Position closing is allowed only by FIFO rule (rejected)
Opposite positions on a single symbol are disabled (rejected)
No MT5 retcode was returned by the runtime.

Mt5MarketDataWsSubscribeMessage.description: Client-to-server WebSocket message. This is the only supported incoming message type.

symbols.description: Complete desired subscription list for this connection. Each `subscribe` replaces the previous list. Send an empty array to clear subscriptions. A single `subscribe` message can include at most 100 symbols.

Mt5MarketDataWsConnectionReadyMessage.description: Server-to-client message sent after the WebSocket connection is accepted.

symbols.description: Initial active subscription list. This is empty when the socket opens.

Mt5MarketDataWsSubscriptionUpdatedMessag.description: Server-to-client acknowledgement sent after a valid `subscribe` message is applied.

symbols.description: The active subscription list after replacement and symbol resolution.

Mt5MarketDataWsTickMessage.description: Server-to-client live tick message. A tick is emitted only after both bid and ask are known for the symbol.

symbol.description: Present when the error applies to a specific symbol.

Mt5MarketDataWsDocumentation.description: Documentation-only contract object for API reference tools. Runtime clients do not receive this HTTP response.

get.description: Returns public API health metadata for the authenticated tenant.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

get.summary: Get tenant metadata and owner trader id
get.description: Returns tenant metadata plus the internal owner trader id. Use `ownerAccount.accountId` as `{accountId}` on account operation routes.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

post.description: Creates an active API trader, or updates the existing trader with the same `externalTraderId` for this tenant.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

get.description: Lists tenant traders. Internal owner accounts are hidden unless `includeInternal=true` is supplied.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

post.description: Validates MT5 credentials for an account without storing them.

422.description: MT5 credentials were rejected during validation.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

get.description: Returns one tenant trader by `traderId`. For connected traders, includes live MT5 account info when the API key also has `mt5:read`.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

patch.description: Updates mutable trader profile fields and metadata for one tenant trader.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

delete.description: Marks a trader inactive and disables any active MT5 credentials for that trader.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

post.description: Validates MT5 credentials for an account and stores them unless `validateOnly=true`. `accountId` is a `tenant_traders.traderId`.

422.description: MT5 credentials were rejected during validation.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

delete.description: Disables stored MT5 credentials for an account and marks the account as not connected.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

get.description: Returns the stored MT5 credential status for an account. `status` is a fixed enum, not a free-form runtime message.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

get.description: `accountId` is a `tenant_traders.traderId`, including the owner account id returned by `/api/v1/tenant`.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

get.description: Lists lightweight broker symbol catalog rows visible to this MT5 account. Use `GET /symbols/{symbol}` for full MT5 `symbol_info` metadata.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

get.description: Returns broker metadata for one symbol. Fields follow the MT5 Python `symbol_info` named tuple.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

get.description: Returns the latest quote tick for a selected broker symbol.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

get.description: Returns OHLC bars for a symbol and timeframe. Use either `dateFrom`/`dateTo`, `dateFrom`/`count`, or `startPos`/`count`.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

get.description: Returns raw tick data for a symbol over a time range or up to `count` ticks from `dateFrom`.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

get.description: Returns currently open pending orders for the account, filtered and paginated locally when requested.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

get.description: Returns currently open positions for the account, filtered and paginated locally when requested.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

get.description: Returns the total number of currently open pending orders for the account.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

get.description: Returns the total number of currently open positions for the account.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

get.description: Returns historical orders for a required MT5 time range, filtered and paginated locally when requested.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

get.description: Returns historical deals for a required MT5 time range, filtered and paginated locally when requested.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

get.description: Returns the total number of historical orders in the requested MT5 time range.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

get.description: Returns the total number of historical deals in the requested MT5 time range.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

post.description: Broker trade rejection is returned as a successful HTTP response with MT5 retcode data. HTTP errors are reserved for API/platform failures.

position.description: MT5 position ticket to close on hedging accounts.

deviation.description: Maximum allowed slippage in symbol points for market execution. For example, on a 5-digit EURUSD quote where 1 point is 0.00001, deviation 20 allows up to 0.00020 price movement.

schema.description: Market buy/sell trade request supported by both execution backends.

409.description: Idempotency key conflict or request still in progress.

422.description: Trade request could not be normalized or submitted.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

get.summary: Stream live MT5 ticks over WebSocket

requestBody.description: Documentation-only schema for the WebSocket client message. Send this JSON as a WebSocket text frame after the HTTP 101 upgrade.

101.description: Switching Protocols. Runtime clients should expect this response for a successful WebSocket upgrade. Message schemas are documented under the request body and the documentation-only 200 response.

200.description: Documentation response for API reference tools. Runtime clients must perform a WebSocket upgrade and should expect HTTP 101, not a JSON HTTP 200 response.

401.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

403.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

404.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

426.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.

default.description: API, authentication, validation, rate limit, or runtime error.
